meanings.definition: keep in mind for attention or consideration
examples: Remember to call your mother every day!
Think of the starving children in India!

meanings.definition: take into consideration, have in view
examples: He entertained the notion of moving to South America
she looked on this affair as a joke
He thinks of himself as a brilliant musician
He is reputed to be intelligent
I'm thinking of good food when I talk about France
Yes, I meant you when I complained about people who gossip!
He thought up a plan to get rich quickly
no-one had ever thought of such a clever piece of software
Think of any integer between 1 and 25
